creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Thu May 30 17:53:04 2013
New Revision: 319439
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/319439

Log:
  - Trim Makefile header
  - Remove unnecessary depend on PERL_LEVEL < 5.12
  
  PR:		ports/178921
  Submitted by:	az
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/Makefile
  head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/Makefile	Thu May 30 17:48:37 2013	(r319438)
+++ head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/Makefile	Thu May 30 17:53:04 2013	(r319439)
@@ -22,14 +22,4 @@ PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=	Crypt::Simple.3
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
-
-.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 500703
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Digest-MD5>=2.16:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-MD5
-.endif
-
-.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 500903
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-IO-Compress>=2.017:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/p5-IO-Compress
-.endif
-
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/pkg-descr	Thu May 30 17:48:37 2013	(r319438)
+++ head/security/p5-Crypt-Simple/pkg-descr	Thu May 30 17:53:04 2013	(r319439)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 Perl encrypt stuff simply
 
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Crypt-Simple/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Crypt-Simple/
